data.title: Ripple Builds XRP ‘Wall Street Kit’: Developer Claims ‘Billions Incoming’
data.description:
Software engineer and AI founder Vincent Van Code (@vincent_vancode) is arguing that institutional barriers to holding and using XRP have largely shifted from “market structure” to “plumbing,” claiming Ripple has spent 2025–2026 assembling an institutional stack for custody, treasury, and prime brokerage that makes large-scale participation operationally viable. In a post on X on Wednesday, the engineer framed self-custody as a non-starter for traditional allocators managing retirement pools, pensions, and bank balance sheets. Ripple Assembles The XRP ‘Wall Street Kit’ “Institutions juggling billions in 401(k)s, pensions, hedge funds, banks & governments? Self-custody was always insane—audit hell, compliance nightmares, risk officers saying ‘no way,’” he wrote. “That changed in 2025–2026
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/xrp-news/ripple-xrp-wall-street-kit/

data.title: The whale holding $846 million in long positions has already realized a profit of $48.25 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, a large long whale (0xb31...83ae) with $230 million in funds currently holds long positions totaling $846 million. This whale has held its position for 19 consecutive days since its last addition on the 26th of last month. During the period when ETH fell to $2780, this position experienced a floating loss of $74 million. With ETH rebounding and breaking through $3300, the whale has now realized a floating profit of $48.25 million. The specific holdings and profit/loss details are as follows: 1. Holding 203,000 ETH long positions at an opening price of $3,147, currently showing a floating profit of $37.21 million; 2. Holding 1,000 BTC long positions at an opening price of $91,506, currently showing a floating profit of $3.6 million; 3. Holding 511,000 SOL long positions at an opening price of $130.1, currently showing a floating profit of $7.43 million.

data.title: Visa partners with BVNK to launch stablecoin payment service
data.description: Visa has announced a partnership with stablecoin payment infrastructure company BVNK to integrate stablecoin functionality into its Visa Direct real-time payments network. This partnership will allow businesses in select markets to pre-fund payments with stablecoins and directly distribute funds to recipients' digital wallets. BVNK will provide the underlying infrastructure to process and settle these stablecoin transactions; the company currently processes over $30 billion in stablecoin payments annually. Visa invested in BVNK through its venture capital arm in May 2025, and Citigroup subsequently made a strategic investment. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Visa Integrates Stablecoin Capabilities with BVNK for Real-Time Payments
data.description: According to PANews, Visa has announced a partnership with stablecoin payment infrastructure company BVNK to integrate stablecoin functionalities into its Visa Direct real-time payment network. This collaboration will enable businesses in specific markets to pre-fund payments using stablecoins and directly disburse funds to recipients' digital wallets. BVNK will provide the underlying infrastructure to process and settle these stablecoin transactions, with the company currently handling over $30 billion in stablecoin payments annually. Visa made an investment in BVNK through its venture capital arm in May 2025, followed by a strategic investment from Citigroup.

data.title: Animoca Brands has completed its acquisition of digital collectibles and gaming company SOMO.
data.description: According to its official blog, Animoca Brands has completed its acquisition of SOMO, a digital collectibles and gaming company. SOMO owns titles such as SOMO Codex, SOMO Duel, and its flagship game SOMO Battlegrounds, and its ecosystem focuses on transforming digital collectibles into playable, streamable, and tradable assets across games. Yat Siu, co-founder and executive chairman of Animoca Brands, stated that SOMO is building a cultural operating system for collectibles, which complements the company's existing portfolio. By integrating SOMO into its ecosystem, Animoca Brands plans to leverage its global network of games, communities, and partners to drive cross-platform promotion and community growth for the SOMO brand.

data.title: Gate Launchpad Phase 6 Immunefi (IMU) is about to launch, supporting subscriptions with USD1 and GUSD, with 100% unlocked distribution.
data.description: According to the official announcement, the sixth phase of Gate Launchpad, Immunefi (IMU), will open for subscription on January 19th at 16:00 (UTC+8). Tokens for this phase will be distributed in a 100% unlocked manner. This Launchpad supports subscriptions in both USD1 and GUSD, providing users with a more flexible participation method. GUSD is a yield-generating asset backed by RWA government bonds, with daily automatic yield payments that can be directly used for this Launchpad subscription, helping users achieve stable returns while participating in new coin subscriptions. In addition, Gate Savings is launching a USD1 investment program, offering new users a 200% annualized return on their IMU subscriptions.

data.title: Pundi AI partners with OptimAI Network to accelerate the development of autonomous AI agents.
data.description: According to official news, "Pundi AI has announced a collaboration with OptimAI Network, the first Layer-2 reinforced data network, to jointly promote the development of agentic AI systems. This collaboration combines Pundi AI's decentralized and verifiable data infrastructure deployed on the BNB chain with OptimAI's community-enhanced intelligence, aiming to accelerate the global deployment of user-owned, privacy-first AI agents. Since its launch in March 2025, OptimAI Network has expanded to 870,000 installed nodes and 530,000 users, becoming a representative of decentralized AI in the Web3 field. Through this collaboration, Pundi AI will provide OptimAI with on-chain data traceability, community annotation, and transparent data ownership support, ensuring that AI training uses open, verifiable, and community-controlled data. Both parties are committed to building transparent, scalable, and human-interest-oriented agentic AI systems, promoting the democratization of AI. This milestone marks a significant step for Pundi AI in transforming data into on-chain intellectual property and enabling open participation in the AI ​​economy. More integration and community plans will be announced in the coming weeks."

data.title: Institutional Investment Key to Bitcoin's Growth, Says Capriole Founder
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on January 14, Charles Edwards, founder of the Bitcoin and digital asset quantitative fund Capriole, stated that retail investors are not crucial in the recovery of the crypto market. He compared Bitcoin to gold, noting that gold's market size is more than ten times that of Bitcoin. Edwards emphasized the importance of institutional funds, which are essential for driving Bitcoin's price upward.

Edwards argued that for Bitcoin to achieve significant growth, it is necessary to eliminate obvious and major risks to maximize institutional investment willingness. He identified quantum computing as the only and most significant headwind risk currently facing Bitcoin.

data.title: Aster: The second season of the "Man vs. Machine" trading competition will be held on the Aster Chain testnet, with a prize pool of $150,000.
data.description: Aster announced on its X platform that the second season of the Human vs. AI trading competition will be held on the Aster Chain testnet. The total prize pool for this season is $150,000, which will double to $100,000 if a human contestant wins. The competition rules include: recruiting 100 human traders, each allocated $10,000 with no risk of loss; the AI ​​team will use advanced agent models from leading labs. The registration deadline is January 18th, the selected participants will be announced on January 20th, and the official competition will run from January 22nd to January 29th.

data.title: A trader profited $24.5 million by shorting BTC, ETH, and SOL using 20x leverage.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, the trader who previously profited $24.5 million by "selling 255 BTC short" has switched from long to short and opened a 20x leveraged short position, including: 464.28 BTC (worth $44.1 million), 6606.66 ETH (worth $22 million), and 54281 SOL (worth $7.8 million).

data.title: Trader Shifts Strategy with High-Leverage Short Positions
data.description: According to Odaily, a trader who previously profited $24.5 million by shorting 255 BTC has now shifted from a long to a short position. The trader has initiated 20x leverage short positions, including 464.28 BTC, 6606.66 ETH, and 54281 SOL.

data.title: U.S. November Retail Sales Data Release Expected to Influence Dollar
data.description: According to Odaily, the delayed U.S. November retail sales data is set to be released tonight due to the government shutdown. The market anticipates a modest increase of 0.4% in sales for November, compared to a flat 0% recorded in October. Although the retail sales report is a crucial indicator of consumer spending and demand, the delay in its release has diminished its potential impact on the dollar. However, some institutions predict that any significant discrepancy between the actual retail sales figures and the expected values could decisively affect the dollar's movement. If the report results fall significantly below expectations, it may exert pressure on the dollar; conversely, if the data exceeds expectations, it should bolster the dollar. Overall, this reaction is likely to be short-lived as investors continue to focus on other factors.

data.title: Matrixport: Options no longer dominate price movements; market positioning shifts towards caution.
data.description: Matrixport released a chart today stating that the increased trading activity in Bitcoin and Ethereum options over the past two years has been a significant driver of market performance, but recently the impact of options on prices has weakened considerably. Ethereum options exposure peaked in August 2025, while Bitcoin options exposure peaked in October 2025. Since then, option-related positions in both markets have declined significantly, deleveraging has continued, and the impact of options on spot price volatility has decreased accordingly. This change reflects that some funds have slowed their entry pace in the short term, and new position allocations are becoming more selective. Bitcoin notional options exposure has decreased from approximately $52 billion to approximately $28 billion. Although many traders still express their expectation of further upward movement by buying call options, Ethereum's position structure shows different characteristics: previously, long futures positions were often hedged with put options, but these hedging combinations are now being gradually unwound, indicating that deleveraging is still underway.
